title: Vic's Point Blank - Trauma
description: Trauma is a Industrial Gun Pack set from the Years 1853-1958 mostly featuring WW1/WW2 Style Weapons
body:
![TraumaHeaderRedtide](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5c2b728208ae9ef8313d4907a68fc77d8e2063d_0.webp)

## **Important**!

###  Trauma is a Industrial Gun Pack set from the Years 1853-1958 mostly featuring WW1/WW2 Style Weapons

[Join the Pointblank Discord](https://discord.gg/M4Ywj7tdU4)

 

## **Requirements:**

[Vic's Point Blank](https://modrinth.com/mod/vics-point-blank)

[Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)

## **Progress/Additional Information**

Trauma is a Historical Firearms Pack that is Based in mostly from the beginning of Victorian Colonialism to the Early Cold War and Decolonization with those being based from the Crimean Wars (1853-1856) to Suez Crisis (1956) my main focus at the moment would be World War 2.

I am looking at people who might be interested in contributing to Trauma. if you are interested, join the Vic's Point Blank Discord (https://discord.gg/MyTa8GJB) and contact me on display discord, my name is Teufelsbann.

This pack started development on February 4th, 2024, and is one of my hobby projects, with me working on and off on it over the past year and a half.

## **Installation**

 Install "Vic's Point Blank"
 Create in your Minecraft (Cursed Forge Modpack) directory "pointblank" folder 
 Unzip the "TRAUMA_PACK" file into "pointblank" 
 
## **Problems**
- N/A
